creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169849
patch to update from 2.14.1 to 2.14.2

QGIS 2.14.2 is a minor update, that comes with many bugfixes in general, in database support, processing, GDAL and in Python.


The patch was tested on Poudriere (9.3i/a, 10.3a, HEADa, with options all enabled, all disabled and default).

portlint -AC is happy.
